steps.title: Find the remaining probability
steps.content:
Each attendee is in exactly one room, so the probabilities add to $1$:
$$
P(C)=1-0.64-0.28=0.08
$$

steps.title: Convert probability to count
steps.content: Multiply the total number of attendees by the probability for room C: $$ 625(0.08)=50 $$ The answer is B.
